intro: Acrocarpidium cordifolium, also known as Heart-leaf, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is prized for its various health benefits, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Acrocarpidium cordifolium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory ailments and soothe sore throats.
